calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-10-2024 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-22-2024 Continued To Jun-10-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mark Moktarian appeared via courtcall for Inheritance Advance LLC.

This was a pre-granted matter. Mr. Moktarian stated that he filed objections on Monday and requested a short continuance. The First and Final Report of Administrator on Waiver of Account and Petition for Final Distribution is continued to June 10, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. A written response to the objections is to be filed no later than June 3, 2024 (ordered in open court).

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Tan. Not reported.
